description_long: This is a robust stone gate featuring a central arched opening flanked by two thick stone pillars. Each pillar is topped with a lantern-style lamp, adding both decorative and functional lighting elements. The gate itself consists of two solid wooden panels set within the arch, likely designed to swing open. The stonework is weathered, with visible textural variations and some moss or discoloration, suggesting outdoor placement. The lamps have metal and glass housings, and the overall structure is substantial, indicating it is intended as a secure entryway. The design is utilitarian with minimal ornamentation, focusing on durability and classic architectural lines.
description: A sturdy stone arch gate with wooden double doors and lantern-topped stone pillars, showing weathered textures and classic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched stone structure, wooden double doors, and both lantern-topped pillars clearly.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the stone arch and pillars, with one lantern visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the arch, wooden doors, and both lanterns from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth of the structure and one lantern from the side.
